name: Large Blue Painted Ceramic Vase - Threshold™
description:
Make any room more welcoming with this Large Painted Ceramic Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this vase features large blue leaf designs on a white backdrop for a lively display. Fill this vase with fresh flowers or faux stems and pair it with other matching vases for a coordinated look, perfect for creating a cozy nook in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
